description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, slightly tapered body with a woven texture on its main panels, giving it a natural, artisanal appearance. The exterior is primarily a muted brown with a subtle geometric pattern, likely achieved through a basket-weave or similar technique. The top edge is reinforced with a darker, smooth trim, which appears to be made of leather or faux leather, adding both structure and contrast. A single, thin wrist strap is attached to one corner, designed for easy carrying and likely made of a durable synthetic or leather material. The handbag is compact and flat, suitable for carrying small personal items such as a phone, wallet, or keys. There are no visible logos, hardware, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A compact, rectangular handbag with a woven brown exterior, dark trim, and a single thin wrist strap. The design is minimalist, with a subtle geometric pattern and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full woven panel, dark trim at the top, and the wrist strap extending from the left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the handbag's slim profile and the thickness of the dark trim along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the woven pattern and wrist strap now on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
attribute_strap_type: single thin wrist strap, short length, non-adjustable, attached at one corner
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure located along the top edge, partially visible at the ends
